NOTES:

The corresponding mandatory HSKK fees for HSK levels 3, 4, 5, and 6 are listed together. Please do not make separate payments.

Please do not forget to fill the application form.

PAYMENT CURRENCY IS EURO. Other payment methods (such as AliPay, WeChat, etc.) are not accepted.

The payment receipt must include the following information: your full name, ID/passport number, and the desired level. As long as these details are included, someone else can also make the payment on your behalf.
